rulings.Case Title: LARRY CHEW VS. CHASE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 6, 2012, line 2. JP Morgan Chase Bank's Motion To Strike Deny. Motion to Strike. Deny Motion to continue. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY CHEW VS. CHASE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To 3rd Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 6, 2012, line 2. Defendant JP Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer to 3rd Amended Complaint Sustained without leave to amend. 1) Prior court order indicated this would be final opportunity to attempt to allege cause of action against Chase. (501/REQ)

Prevailing party to prepare order.(501/REQ)
